title: Response format preference
content: The demo user prefers structured JSON contexts for agent memory recall.

title: Retrieval project state
content: The demo project uses SQLite FTS5 as the durable keyword retrieval baseline before adding optional dense retrieval.

title: Local-first tool policy
content: Use local storage and deterministic export formats before introducing external services.

title: FTS5 backend config
content: SQLite FTS5 backend configuration for local keyword indexing.

title: Dense retrieval decision
content: Decision: keep BGE-M3 as an optional sidecar index rather than a hard dependency.
